title: phegopteris keraudreniana
intro: Phegopteris keraudreniana, also known as the Keraudren's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris keraudreniana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
